name: CMP_CSTM_REGION_ITEMS_VL
query: SELECT B.CUSTOM_ID, B.CUSTOM_TYPE, B.CUSTOM_KEY, B.REGION_NAME, B.ITEM_NAME, B.DISPLAY_FLAG, B.UPDATE_ALLOWED_FLAG, B.ORDER_NUM, B.SYSTEM_ORDER_NUM, B.COLUMN_BANDING, B.INITIALLY_HIDDEN_FLAG, B.OVERRIDE_CODE, B.CONDITION_TYPE_CODE, B.WRAP_TEXT_FLAG, B.COLUMN_WIDTH, B.COLUMN_SHADE_CODE, T.DISPLAY_NAME, T.DESCRIPTION, B.OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER, B.CREATED_BY, B.CREATION_DATE, B.LAST_UPDATED_BY, B.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, B.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN, B.BUSINESS_GROUP_ID, B.UPDATE_IN_WORKBOOK_FLAG, B.UPDATE_COND_CODE, B.HIDE_VIEW_PRINT_ICON_FLAG FROM CMP_CSTM_REGION_ITEMS_B B, CMP_CSTM_REGION_ITEMS_TL T WHERE B.CUSTOM_ID = T.CUSTOM_ID AND T.LANGUAGE = USERENV('LANG') AND B.BUSINESS_GROUP_ID = T.BUSINESS_GROUP_ID
